privacy_view.title: Privacy Protocol
privacy_view.subtitle: System Security & Data Minimization Standards
privacy_view.lead_paragraph: Vantage AI is committed to an architectural paradigm prioritizing absolute user sovereignty, zero trackers, and cryptographic isolation. This document outlines our structural protocols regarding storage, intelligence resolution, and automatic API sync scopes.

sec_1.title: 1. Ledger Sovereignty & Vault Storage
sec_1.desc: All ledger indices, personal financial records, and manual account balances are persisted inside a secure, sandboxed Google Firebase Firestore cloud vault database. Access controls are regulated by strict user-level authorization rules. No third parties have access to your raw numeric balance profiles.

sec_2.title: 2. Cryptographic Telemetry Isolation
sec_2.desc: Vantage AI operates under strict telemetry-free principles. We do not implement diagnostic trackers, tracking pixels, or user behavior analytics tools. Alert thresholds exists purely within your sandboxed profile. No background telemetry is shared with external advertising servers.

sec_3.title: 3. Self-Destruct Command & Data Purging
sec_3.desc: In accordance with zero-knowledge data ownership standards, you may invoke the permanent "Self-Destruct Matrix" at any time from your settings menu. Activating this command dispatches bulk delete requests to wipe your cloud Firestore paths, immediately invalidates your authenticated active tokens, and purges all cookies, indexes, and cache from your browser.

sec_4.title: 4. Portability & Compliance Retention
sec_4.desc: Compliance requires active ownership. You can request a complete structured JSON copy of your personal transactional ledger list, or print/export these privacy standards at any time for your offline compliance registers. We fully support standard offline storage policies and GDPR portability regulations.

sec_5.title: 5. AI & Generative Intelligence
sec_5.desc: All generative intelligence, financial projections, conversational assistant transactions, and smart categorization are securely processed via proxy. Data is dispatched via server-side APIs to Google Gemini. Zero identifiers or user profiles are sent in plain requests, and we enforce a zero-cache policy on transient session logs.

sec_6.title: 6. Enhanced Integrations
sec_6.desc: Sync tools for Google Calendar and Google Tasks operate under strict user-directed consent scopes. OAuth transport credentials and synchronized task attributes reside safely within secure client caches or sandboxed database variables. No secondary synchronization data is shared, sold, or distributed.

quick_add_widgets.title: Android Homescreen Widgets Configurator
quick_add_widgets.header_desc: Build and linked custom tracking shortcuts. Simulates tactile PWA Android homescreen widgets.
quick_add_widgets.help_desc: Our platform utilizes standard Progressive Web App (PWA) configurations. To enable widgets and fast Launchpads on your actual mobile phone:
quick_add_widgets.help_step1: Open this web suite inside Google Chrome or similar on your Android device.
quick_add_widgets.help_step2: Tap the browser context menu (three dots icon in top-right) and choose 'Add to Home screen' or 'Install App'.
quick_add_widgets.help_step3: Long press anywhere on your Android desktop wallpaper space and tap 'Widgets'.
quick_add_widgets.help_step4: Look up YOUR FINANCES to drag and drop these configured quick-add widget modules onto your home grids! They will map directly to your live budget envelopes.
quick_add_widgets.field2_note: Note: You must create at least one Mini-Budget under the Budgets tab first.
quick_add_widgets.no_widgets_desc: You haven't configured any Quick-Add widget buttons yet. Create one to instantly simulate recorded transactions.
quick_add_widgets.side_desc: Scroll through your active budgets and record transactions directly. This mimics the native Android Hybrid Widget powered by BroadcastReceiver and RemoteViews.
quick_add_widgets.toast_msg: Beautiful new Quick-Add widget placed on your virtual Android homescreen!

terms_view.lead: Please review the terms governing our financial ledger operations, generative intelligence advice nodes, and Google Cloud database systems carefully.

t1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
t1.desc: By accessing YOUR FINANCES by ME Vantage (the "App"), operated by ME Vantage Analytics and Strategy, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Engagement. If you are using the App on behalf of a business entity (e.g., an Odoo consultancy), you represent that you have the authority to bind that entity to these terms.

b1.head: Tiered Access
b1.txt: Premium features, including Gemini AI Insights, Google Calendar Sync, and Google Tasks Integration, are reserved for paid subscribers.

b2.head: Billing
b2.txt: Subscriptions are managed via the Google Play Store/Apple App Store. Under UAE Consumer Protection Law, all fees are transparent and published before purchase.

b3.head: Cancellation
b3.txt: You may cancel at any time; however, access to Premium "Nodes" will terminate at the end of the current billing cycle.

b1.head: Informational Purpose
b1.txt: The Gemini AI integrations provide automated financial analysis and "Insights." This content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional financial, legal, or investment advice.

b2.head: User Responsibility
b2.txt: You are solely responsible for verifying the accuracy of any AI-generated suggestions before taking financial action. ME Vantage is not liable for financial losses resulting from AI-generated content or "Hallucinations".

b1.head: Google Ecosystem
b1.txt: The App utilizes Google APIs for authentication, calendar events, and task management. Your use is subject to Google’s Terms of Service in addition to these terms.

b2.head: Currency Exchange
b2.txt: Rates provided via ExchangeRate-API are mid-market rates and may differ from the "Buy/Sell" rates offered by your local UAE or Philippine banks.

b1.head: The "Vantage" Brand
b1.txt: All code, custom UI (including the Slim Obsidian and Emerald Green brand elements), and documentation are the exclusive property of ME Vantage Analytics and Strategy.

b2.head: Usage Limits
b2.txt: You may not reverse-engineer, scrape, or attempt to replicate the core logic of the Vantage ledger for commercial resale.

t6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
t6.desc: To the maximum extent permitted by UAE Law, ME Vantage shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, including loss of data or financial loss, arising from your use of the App or any service interruptions in the Firebase Blaze infrastructure.

controls.agreement_desc: Acceptance of these terms registers a cryptographic signature matching your sandboxed identity inside our secure databases.

s1.title: App Introduction
s1.text: Your future financial freedom starts with YOUR FINANCES. Let’s take a brief tour to show you how to effortlessly manage your net worth, monitor budgets, and achieve your financial goals with absolute clarity.

s2.title: Financial Summary
s2.text: This is your financial reporting. Get a real-time overview of your combined Net Worth, Available Cash , and Total Assets tracked safely in one dashboard layer.

s3.title: Accounts Hub
s3.text: This is where your financial infrastructure lives. Tap here to manage your liquid bank accounts, review physical cash, and track outstanding credit card liabilities.

s4.title: Transactions Details
s4.text: Your transaction history, simplified. Keep tabs on standard daily cash sependings and review transaction groups to see exactly where your money moves.

s5.title: Income & Envelopes
s5.text: Track your budget boundaries without the stress. This area showcases your automated income allocation and personalized framework mini-budgets, living safely right here under your active Essentials tab.

s6.title: Saving Goals
s6.text: Keep an eye on your long-term goals. Watch your milestone targets grow and track allocation toward your goals.

s7.title: Debt Management
s7.text: Eliminate your debts. Monitor card statements and outstanding debt limits seamlessly over an aggregated, pressure-free space.

s8.title: Quick Action
s8.text: Ready to add a new transaction, transfer funds between accounts, or update an envelope target? Tap this central button to initiate a fresh action instantly from any screen.

s9.title: Smart Alerts
s9.text: Never miss a critical financial notification. Tap here to view alerts, payment due date notices, set your own reminders and strategic tracking insights.

s10.title: Profile & Settings
s10.text: Customize your profile and app. Tap here to modify your base currency choice, update personal goals, configure notifications, or review our legal policies safely.

trajectory_visualizer.disclaimer: Calculations compound your net worth assuming an optimized baseline rate vector with a consistent monthly savings allocation rate.
